top_signals.title: China imposes travel ban on New Zealand lawmakers over Taiwan trip
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as Broadcom’s Outlook Fails to Inspire: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in high-flying chipmakers dragged down stocks, with Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook testing the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the market from war-driven lows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Five Eyes warn Chinese spies are using job sites to recruit insiders
top_signals.summary: The alert warned that Chinese intelligence officers are posing as recruiters and consultants for front companies based outside China in order to target Five Eyes government and military personnel “and anyone with access to classified or privileged information.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Universal theme park to be UK’s most popular tourist attraction
top_signals.summary: The Universal United Kingdom Resort, one of the largest ever investments in the UK tourism sector, will employ thousands and entertain millions of people.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Sells Rocket Business Hype in 17-Minute Video Pitch
top_signals.summary: SpaceX set out its IPO pitch to retail investors early on Thursday with a video in which Chief Financial Officer Bret Johnsen joins the dots between the company’s rocket, satellite and AI businesses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Micron, Marvell, and Broadcom sink, leading chip stocks lower
top_signals.summary: U.S. chipmakers plunged after Broadcom earnings disappointed investors.
